---
title: Events
page-navigation: false
# css: 
#   - past-events-styles.css
#   - upcoming-events-styles.css 
listing:
  - id: upcoming-events
    template: upcoming-events-template.ejs
    contents: events/
    page-size: 999
    categories: unnumbered
  - id: year_2026
    contents: events/
    page-size: 999
    template: past-events-template.ejs
    template-params:
      year: 2026
  # - id: year_2025
  #   contents: events/
  #   page-size: 999
  #   template: past-events-template.ejs
  #   template-params:
  #     year: 2025
  # - id: year_2024
  #   contents: events/
  #   page-size: 999
  #   template: past-events-template.ejs
  #   template-params:
  #     year: 2024
  # - id: year_2023
  #   contents: events/
  #   page-size: 999
  #   template: past-events-template.ejs
  #   template-params:
  #     year: 2023
  # - id: year_2022
  #   contents: events/
  #   sort: "date desc"
  #   page-size: 999
  #   template: past-events-template.ejs
  #   template-params:
  #     year: 2022
  # - id: year_2021
  #   contents: events/
  #   page-size: 999
  #   template: past-events-template.ejs
  #   template-params:
  #     year: 2021
  # - id: year_2020
  #   contents: events/
  #   page-size: 999
  #   template: past-events-template.ejs
  #   template-params:
  #     year: 2020
  # - id: year_2019
  #   contents: events/
  #   page-size: 999
  #   template: past-events-template.ejs
  #   template-params:
  #     year: 2019
  # - id: year_2018
  #   contents: events/
  #   page-size: 999
  #   template: past-events-template.ejs
  #   template-params:
  #     year: 2018
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
toc-expand: 3
toc-location: left
page-layout: full #right
repo-actions: false
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <script src="/assets/javascript/clear_filter_button.js" defer></script>
      <script src="/assets/bootstrap-5.3.8-dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js" defer></script>
---




```{=html}

<style>
.card-header a {
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--osc-green);
}

.card-header a:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

.card-text-clamp {
  display: -webkit-box;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 4;
  overflow: hidden;
}
</style>

<div class="card">

  <div class="card-header d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between gap-2">
    <a class="flex-grow-1 text-truncate fw-semibold fs-5 lh-sm" href="#">This Title Is A Bit Too Long, but the card-header Automatically Truncates It When It Gets to the Badge on the Right</a>
    <span class="badge text-bg-light border ms-2 text-nowrap d-none d-md-block">Conference</span>
  </div>


  <!-- start row -->
  <div class="row g-0 align-items-center">
    <div class="col-md-2 px-2 d-none d-md-block">
      <img src="/events/images/conference.svg" class="img-fluid d-block mx-auto rounded-start" alt="..."> 
    </div>


    <div class="col-md-10">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h6 class="card-subtitle mb-2">07-15 Sept, 2026</h6>
        <h6 class="card-subtitle mb-2">9:00-17:30 | Library, Address Here 80549 Munich | Hybrid | EN</h6>
        <p class="card-text card-text-clamp">This is a wider card with supporting text below as a natural lead-in to additional content. This content is a little bit longer. This is a wider card with supporting text below as a natural lead-in to additional content. This content is a little bit longer. This is a wider card with supporting text below as a natural lead-in to additional content. This content is a little bit longer.</p>
        <div class="card-text d-none d-md-block">
          <div class="d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center gap-2">
            <span class="small text-body-secondary fw-semibold text-nowrap">Organizers:</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Anna Meier</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Ben Fischer</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Clara Novak</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Anna Meier</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Ben Fischer</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Clara Novak</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Anna Meier</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Ben Fischer</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Clara Novak</span>
          </div>
          <div class="d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center gap-2 mt-2">
            <span class="small text-body-secondary fw-semibold text-nowrap">Presenters:</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Anna Meier</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Ben Fischer</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Clara Novak</span>
          </div>
          <div class="d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center gap-2 mt-2">
            <span class="small text-body-secondary fw-semibold text-nowrap">Instructors:</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Anna Meier</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Ben Fischer</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Clara Novak</span>
          </div>
          <div class="d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center gap-2 mt-2">
            <span class="small text-body-secondary fw-semibold text-nowrap">Helpers:</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Anna Meier</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Ben Fischer</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Clara Novak</span>
          </div>
          <div class="d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center gap-2 mt-2">
            <span class="small text-body-secondary fw-semibold text-nowrap">Hosts:</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary" data-bs-toggle="tooltip" title="LMU Open Science Center">LMU Open Science Center</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary" data-bs-toggle="tooltip" title="Framework for Open and Reproducible Research Training">FORRT</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary" data-bs-toggle="tooltip" title="Professionell in der Lehre">PROFil</span>
          </div>
        </div>

      <!-- end card-body -->
      </div>
    <!-- end col-md-10 -->
    </div>
  <!-- end row -->
  </div>
  


  <div class="card-footer">
    <div class="row g-2 align-items-center">
      <div class="col">
        Questions? Contact the organizers: <a href="mailto:organizers@example.com">Person Name</a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-auto">
        <a class="btn btn-primary btn-sm text-nowrap" href="#">Read More</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>


</div>
<!-- add some space before the upcoming events header -->
<br>
<br>
```


```{=html}
<script>
const tooltipTriggerList = document.querySelectorAll('[data-bs-toggle="tooltip"]')
const tooltipList = [...tooltipTriggerList].map(tooltipTriggerEl => new bootstrap.Tooltip(tooltipTriggerEl))
</script>
```


<!-- another card option, or at least some ideas for handling people -->
```{=html}
<div class="card">
  <div class="card-header d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between gap-2">
    <span class="flex-grow-1 text-truncate">Open Science in Practice</span>
    <span class="badge text-bg-light border ms-2 text-nowrap">Conference</span>
  </div>

  <div class="card-body">
    <h6 class="card-subtitle mb-2">07–15 Sept 2026</h6>
    <h6 class="card-subtitle mb-3">9:00–17:30 | Library, Address Here | Hybrid | EN</h6>

    <p class="card-text">
      This is a wider card with supporting text below as a natural lead-in to additional content.
    </p>

    <div class="mt-4">
      <h6 class="text-uppercase text-body-secondary fw-semibold mb-3">People</h6>

      <div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-md-2 g-3">
        <div class="col">
          <div class="small text-body-secondary fw-semibold">Organizers</div>
          <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-1">
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Anna Meier</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Ben Fischer</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Clara Novak</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col">
          <div class="small text-body-secondary fw-semibold">Presenters</div>
          <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-1">
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Daniel Klein</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Eva Smith</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col">
          <div class="small text-body-secondary fw-semibold">Instructors</div>
          <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-1">
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Fatima Ali</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Jonas Weber</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col">
          <div class="small text-body-secondary fw-semibold">Helpers</div>
          <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-1">
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Lea Vogel</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Max Roth</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Nina Scholz</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col">
          <div class="small text-body-secondary fw-semibold">Hosts</div>
          <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-1">
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">OSC Team</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```



## Upcoming Events

::: {#upcoming-events}
:::


## Past Events


### 2026
::: {#year_2026}
:::


<!-- ### 2025

::: {#year_2025}
:::

### 2024

::: {#year_2024}
:::

### 2023

::: {#year_2023}
:::

### 2022

::: {#year_2022}
:::

### 2021
::: {#year_2021}
:::

### 2020
::: {#year_2020}
:::

### 2019
::: {#year_2019}
:::

### 2018
::: {#year_2018}
::: -->
